channel.title: Posts on b.dunnette
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on b.dunnette

item.title: MN 60A Special Election: The Candidates
item.description: Due to the untimely death of Diane Loeffler, those of us in MN District 60A are electing a new state representative. As Naomi Kritzer notes, most of the action is in the 1/21 primary - we’re a pretty “blue” district (the last GOP member to run here, Kelly Winsor, lost by a wide margin), and the only non-Democrat running is Legal Marijuana Now candidate (and Bernie Sanders fan) Marty Super.
